name: Great Chell & Packmoor
description:
This area includes the communities of Fegg Hayes, Oxford, Brindley Ford, Turnhurst and Packmoor and in almost entirely residential.

There is a wide range of homes in the area including modern detached and traditional terraced, with includes a significant number of council built properties.

There is a strong community spirit in the area and a number of active residents groups, including Fegg Hayes, use the following website to work with members of the community: fegghayesresidentassociation.org.uk.
